This scene’s location wasn’t a reference image — I built it purely from the prompt. The atmosphere, the space, the vibe… all directorial.

Seedance 2.0 is already producing film-like scenes 🔥 https://t.co/nm2OuspQ7p

prompt tips from a Bytedance Seedance solution architect:

- be very very concise 
- don't use the word "don't" -- don’t use negative promting, use positive promting
